children.heading: Report on certain activities of export credit agencies of foreign countries
children.label: a Report on certain activities of export credit agencies of foreign countries

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the President shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report on any activity of an export credit agency of a foreign country that is an activity comparable to an activity described in subsection (a) or (b) of section 5 of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996, as amended by section 102 of this Act.July 1, 2010

children.heading: Updates
children.label: 2 Updates
children.text: The President shall update the report required by paragraph (1) as new information becomes available with respect to the activities of export credit agencies of foreign countries.

children.heading: Report on certain financing by the Export-Import Bank of the United States
children.label: b Report on certain financing by the Export-Import Bank of the United States

children.text: the export credit agency of the foreign country; and
